ヘスの八賢者「魔人フィーナ」（CV：水瀬いのり）

異世界パラデイア出身の魔道士。
フィーナの心の奥に潜むもうひとつの人格が実体化した存在。

スマートフォン及びPC向けストラテジックRPG『エンバーストーリア』のキャラクター紹介動画です。
本作は、魔獣はびこる試練の大地レンゴクを舞台に、敵勢力とのバトル、大型魔獣の討伐など大規模な集団（同盟）戦闘が楽しめるストラテジックRPGです。

Take a look at the Vault Edition trailer for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, the latest entry in the rebooted Modern Warfare series. War erupts on the Korean Peninsula as North Korea launches a full-scale invasion that threatens to destabilize the world. A young squad of South Korean soldiers fight to survive on the collapsing front lines, while half a world away, a vengeful Captain Price wages a personal war from the shadows as he

Korea. IL-2 Series - Official Early Access Release Date Trailer
Check out the Early Access release date trailer for Korea. IL-2 Series, the newest entry in the acclaimed aerial combat-sim series! Using the backdrop of the Korean War, Korea. IL-2 Series will allow players to take to the skies in historically accurate aircrafts used in the conflict. Korea. IL-2 Series will be available in Early Access on PC on June 25.
